commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a google-gemini-cli OAuth prepareExecution bridge, forwards selected OpenClaw auth profiles into CLI runs, tests the bridge, and changes esbuild resolution in pnpm workspace/lockfile files.

PR surface: Source +226, Tests +214, Config +28, Other +1. Total +469 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main blocks CLI auth-profile forwarding and the google-gemini-cli backend lacks a prepareExecution bridge, while upstream Gemini CLI reads its own GEMINI_CLI_HOME or ambient .gemini credential state.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow repair can remove the unauthorized dependency graph hunk while leaving the Gemini OAuth bridge intact; otherwise maintainer/security authorization is required.
